hooks.command: node -e "const cp=require('child_process');try{const r=cp.execSync('git status --porcelain',{encoding:'utf8',timeout:5000});if(r.trim()){cp.execSync('git add -A && git commit -m \"savepoint: auto-save\" --no-verify',{stdio:'ignore',timeout:10000})}}catch(e){}"

Stop.description: Auto git savepoint when Claude finishes a turn — one savepoint per prompt, not per file
